name: grammar-game
description: A standalone beginner grammar game for students, styled after the Japanese stationery look of the N4 practice app.

scripts.test: node tests/grammar_core.test.js && node tests/grammar_data.test.js && node tests/vocab_scheduler.test.js && node tests/vocab_data.test.js && node tests/teacher_vocab.test.js && node tests/import_teacher_vocab.test.js
scripts.check:js: node --check grammar_core.js && node --check grammar_data.js && node --check vocab_scheduler.js && node --check vocab_data.js && node --check teacher_vocab_bank.js && node --check teacher_vocab.js && node --check app.js && node --check firebase-init.js && node --check scripts/build-web.js && node --check scripts/firebase-cli.js && node --check scripts/import-teacher-vocab.js && npm --prefix functions run lint && node --check functions/seed-students.js
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:run: npm run build:web && npx cap run android --target S2AIOC447307NGJ
